features.name: parameterized module with large bit-width arithmetic ports
features.description: Code should include a module with parameters defining large bit-widths (e.g., 64-bit inputs, 128-bit output) and parameterized port declarations
features.snippet: module mult #(parameter i_width=64, o_width=128)(input logic[i_width-1:0] multiplier, multiplicand, output logic [o_width-1:0] product);

features.name: combinational always block with integer for loop and conditional
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) block containing an integer for loop with an if conditional inside, implementing iterative arithmetic

features.name: variable left shift of wide signal in arithmetic expression
features.description: Code should include a variable left shift operation on a wide signal (e.g., 64-bit) used in an addition expression inside a loop
